text:
On Wed, Mar 20, 2013 at 12:22 PM, Martin Matuska <mm@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Hi, did you test it with all ports that use it?

Only with what I use: audio/spek and multimedia/vlc. Some of the
others have heavy dependencies (java et al), but I can give it a go
later today.
